overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player traverses elevated walkways and street-level sidewalks, passing vendors and crossing intersections amidst towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking street

events.description: camera looks down from elevated walkway to observe the traffic and wet streets below

agents.ego_description: walking across an elevated glass-railed bridge while observing the street level below

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the bridge pathway

entered.detail: teal-colored transparent safety barrier with metallic posts lining the walkway edge
cluster of illuminated advertisements and holographic displays visible across the street
rain-slicked multi-lane road with vehicle reflections visible beneath the bridge
sleek dark-colored car driving on the wet road below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway with teal glass railings overlooking a rain-soaked street. The camera moves forward while looking down at the traffic below, with neon signs visible in the distance through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide downtown promenade with towering digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of skyscrapers and circular rooftop billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide sidewalk while looking up at the massive buildings and neon signage overhead

entered.detail: broad rain-soaked pedestrian walkway with reflective concrete surface
large cylindrical digital billboard atop a skyscraper displaying rotating colorful graphics
tall building facade covered in illuminated vertical advertisement strips

segments.scene_description: Having descended from the bridge, the scene opens into a wide downtown promenade lined with massive digital billboards. The camera tilts upward to take in a towering skyscraper crowned with a circular rooftop screen, while neon reflections shimmer on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level commercial sidewalk with food vendor

events.description: passing a street food vendor with illuminated umbrella and glowing cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: walking past a street food vendor and continuing along the tree-lined sidewalk

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing under large umbrella beside cooking equipment with vertical neon light

entered.detail: street food cart with red and green umbrella, yellow gas canisters, and bright vertical neon light tube
large mature tree with thick trunk planted in a square cutout of the sidewalk
ground-level commercial windows with illuminated product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along a street-level sidewalk lined with shopfronts and a large street tree. The camera passes a food vendor standing beside a cart with a colorful umbrella and glowing neon light, steam rising from the cooking equipment in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with marked pedestrian crossing

events.description: crossing the marked pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection while vehicles pass nearby

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk while observing traffic and the surrounding cityscape

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with illuminated walk signal markings on the ground
metal railings and bollards separating the pedestrian walkway from the vehicle road
elevated structure spanning the street with multiple digital billboards attached

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the camera crosses the street via a marked crosswalk with glowing walk signals. Metal barriers line the crossing while a vehicle passes nearby, and an overhead bridge structure covered in advertisements spans the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with vertical holographic advertising

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering vertical facade of a skyscraper covered in massive digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering building facades covered in holographic ads before continuing forward

entered.detail: massive skyscraper covered in full-height vertical digital billboards and corporate logos glowing in the rain
large illuminated advertisement screen at street level showing a portrait

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dense urban canyon dominated by a massive skyscraper covered in vertical holographic advertisements. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the building while rain continues to fall, reflecting the neon lights on the wet pavement below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated vantage point down into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins on a pedestrian walkway with teal glass railings, moving forward while looking down at the rain-soaked traffic and hazy city lights below. As the camera descends to a wide downtown promenade, the view tilts upward toward a towering skyscraper with a circular rooftop screen, while the wet pavement begins to shimmer with vibrant neon reflections. The path then leads along a street-level sidewalk past a steaming food vendor under a colorful umbrella before crossing a marked intersection beneath an advertisement-covered bridge. Finally, the camera enters a dense corridor of skyscrapers, tilting up once more to take in a massive building draped in vertical holographic advertisements as rain continues to fall.
